name: capstone-brief-validator
description: Проверяет capstone brief до работы с данными: decision owner и options, route-specific prerequisites, claim boundary, unit/population/horizon, scope 30-50 часов, testable success criteria, полный risk register, семь stage-gated milestones и assistance disclosure. Выпускает audit, risk register, milestone plan, capstone state и SHA-256 manifest.
